search.query: source=fpins ppcode=SSE applicationname =* | stats count by applicationname | table applicationname

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ applicationname="$selectedapp$" | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | head 1 | eval DAYS=floor((now()-_time)/86400) | table DAYS

source=fpins ppcode=SSE applicationname=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | stats count by applicationname | sort - count | head 10

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ applicationname="$selectedapp$"| search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | stats count

panel.title: Total application events of type $selectedsourcetype$ over time

search.query: source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ applicationname="$selectedapp$" | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | timechart span=1d count

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ applicationname="$selectedapp$" | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | bin _time span=1d | eval MARKER = if (_time < relative_time(now(), "@d"), "DISAPPEARED","NEW") | dedup applicationname,MARKER | eventstats count AS FOUND by applicationname | table applicationname, MARKER, FOUND | search MARKER=NEW AND FOUND=1 | fields applicationname

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ applicationname="$selectedapp$" | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | bin _time span=1d | eval MARKER = if (_time < relative_time(now(), "@mon"), "DISAPPEARED","NEW") | dedup applicationname,MARKER | eventstats count AS FOUND by applicationname | table applicationname, MARKER, FOUND | search MARKER=NEW AND FOUND=1 | fields applicationname

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ AND applicationname="$selectedapp$" | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | timechart count by applicationname span=1d

panel.title: Number of unique apps per day - $selectedsourcetype$

search.query: source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ applicationname=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | bin _time span=1d | stats count by applicationname ,_time | timechart count span=1d

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ applicationname="$selectedapp$" applicationname!=s3 | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | eval select=case(status="Internal","Internal", status="External","External",status="Public", "Public") | stats count by applicationname | sort - count | head 10

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | mvexpand activity | search (activity=Uploaded OR activity=Downloaded) | timechart count by activity

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ applicationname=* action=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | mvexpand action | stats count by action
